channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Bad Bunny Shines Bright In ‘Toy Story 5’
item.description: 🚀 Bad Bunny's star power lights up 'Toy Story 5'! The collaboration we didn't know we needed! 🔥 #BadBunny #ToyStory5

item.title: Listen to Eddy Current Suppression Ring’s Surprise New Album
item.description: 🎉 Surprise! Eddy Current Suppression Ring dropped a new album! 🎶 Let's crank up the volume and dive in together! 🤘 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Hear Weezer’s Rivers Cuomo cover Radiohead, Green Day, Metallica, Dolly Parton, Guns N’ Roses & more
item.description: 🎸 Rock out with Rivers Cuomo as he puts his unique spin on your favorite tunes! Which cover are you most excited to hear? 🎶 #MusicNews #Weezer #RiversCuomo

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Reveals ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love’ Split Track List
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo dropping the tea ☕️ Check out the track list for 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love'! 🎶 #OliviaRodrigo #NewMusicAlert

item.title: feeble little horse release new LP ‘bitknot,’ announce tour w/ snuggle, Computerwife & more
item.description: Saddle up, music lovers! 🎸 feeble little horse dropped 'bitknot' LP and tour dates with Snuggle and Computerwife coming your way! 🎶🐎 #newmusic #tourdates
